name: Curried Spinach-Filled Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 9 ounces Pkg Green Giant Harvested spinach - thawed and drained
Lemon and lime slices for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease an 8 x 8-inch or 12 x 8-inch baking dish lightly.
3. Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add onions and garlic; cook and stir for 2 minutes.
5. Reduce heat to medium, then add the thawed spinach and remaining filling ingredients (salt, cumin, coriander, turmeric, cayenne).
6. Cook and stir for 5 minutes, then remove from heat and set aside.
7. Pound each chicken breast half (boned side up) between two pieces of plastic wrap until about 1/4 inch thick using a rolling pin or flat side of a mallet.
8. Brush the smooth side of each chicken piece with the lime juice mixture (lime juice, butter, and turmeric).
9. Spread an unseasoned side evenly with the filling mixture.
10. Starting with the short side of the chicken breast, roll up tightly and place seam-side down in the greased dish.
11. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink. Let cool for 5 minutes.
12. Cut crosswise into 1/2-inch slices.
13. Arrange chicken slices slightly overlapping on a serving platter of cooked rice.
14. Sprinkle lime juice and chopped cilantro over the chicken and rice.
15. Garnish with fresh cilantro, lemon, and lime slices.
